inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue from primary business operations

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to the production of goods sold

inputs.label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Indirect operating expenses including sales, marketing, and administrative costs

inputs.label: Research & Development Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Expenditures for innovation, product development, and process improvements

inputs.label: Depreciation & Amortization
inputs.businessContext: Systematic allocation of tangible and intangible asset costs over useful lives

inputs.label: Other Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Additional operating costs not captured in SG&A, R&D, or D&A
